edgeX (EDGE) is live on WE-Launch—share 8,000 EDGE in airdrops!
By: WEEX
|
0

edgeX (EDGE) landed on WE-Launch.

Simply join and maintain the required average WXT holdings for a chance to share 8,000 EDGE in airdrop rewards.

Join now

📅 Event period: 2026-07-12 10:00 — 2026-07-15 10:00 (UTC+0)

WXT holding airdrop pool
Total prize pool: 8,000 EDGE
Minimum requirement: Maintain an average hourly WXT spot holding of ≥ 300 WXT during the event.
Max. effective holdings per user: 500,000 WXT
Multiple random snapshots of your WXT spot holdings will be taken each hour to calculate the average holdings throughout the event.

  1. Average hourly holdings = Total holdings from all snapshots during the hour ÷ number of snapshots taken that hour
  2. Average holdings during the event = Sum of average hourly holdings throughout the event ÷ total event hours
    You need to maintain an average holding of ≥ 300 WXT during the event to qualify for the WE-Launch airdrop allocation.

Example
Using a 3-day event as an example, the average holdings will be calculated across a total of 72 hours:

  1. If you continuously hold 300 WXT throughout the 72 hours, the average holding will be 300 WXT and you will qualify.
  2. If you hold 300 WXT only during the first 6 hours and hold 0 WXT afterward, the average holding will be 25 WXT and you will not qualify.
  3. If you hold 0 WXT during the first 48 hours and 600 WXT during the final 24 hours, the average holding will be 200 WXT and you will not qualify.

Reward calculation
After the event ends, airdrop rewards will be calculated based on your effective holdings.
Once your average holdings during the event reach the required tier threshold, the corresponding holding multiplier will be applied to calculate your effective holdings.
Estimated rewards = your weighted holdings ÷ total weighted holdings of all users × total reward pool
Your weighted holdings = Your average effective holdings × applicable multiplier
The higher your share of weighted holdings, the greater your share of rewards.

About edgeX (EDGE)

edgeX operates a 24/7 decentralized financial layer for global assets, with sub-10ms execution latency. The platform has processed over $800B in cumulative trading volume and serves more than 300K users.

Additional information
Official website
X

Terms and Conditions:

  1. No fees are required to join WE-Launch events.
  2. You must use the Join button to be included in WE-Launch airdrop calculations.
  3. Eligibility for this airdrop will be determined based on your average hourly WXT spot holdings during the event. If your average holdings fall below 300 WXT, you will not be eligible for rewards.
  4. You can trade or withdraw WXT in your spot account. However, holding changes may affect your average holdings during the event and your final rewards.
  5. Only WXT in your spot account will be included in the snapshot and average holding calculations. WXT held in Earn or other non-spot accounts will not be counted.
  6. The maximum holdings eligible for rewards is capped at 500,000 WXT per user. Any holdings above this limit will not be counted.
  7. Market maker and project team accounts are not eligible for this event.
  8. Malicious behavior is strictly prohibited, including wash trading, volume manipulation, creating multiple accounts for unfair gains, or using falsified identity information. WEEX reserves the right to review participant eligibility, disqualify users, suspend reward distribution, and revoke any rewards already issued to accounts.
  9. WEEX reserves the right of final interpretation of this event. WEEX reserves the right to modify or terminate the event based on market conditions without prior notice. Contact customer support if you have any questions.
Related articles
